publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-08-31 18:27:01 -0400.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: This collection contains ephemera covering artists, both Native American and non-Native American, whose artwork often focused on Native American subjects.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: This collection contains ephemera covering artists, both Native American and non-Native American, whose artwork often focused on Native American subjects. Brochures, auction and exhibition catalogs, correspondence, biographical information, programs from events, photographs, publications, slides, small books, some original sketches. The collection was split between Non-Indian and Indian artists.

odd.head: NOTES
odd.p: Only a fraction of the actual name headings are given in the record; see the guide for the complete listing.
Forms part of the Native American Collection. (NAC)
See also the Native American subject vertical file, #9205 and Native American biography vertical file, #9242.

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST
arrangement.p: Series I. Native American Artists Boxes 1-2

odd.head: General
odd.p: The Collective folder is for single items that contain multiple artists an artist may appear in this folder and in their own alphabetical folder. This is indicated.

odd.head: General
odd.p: Native American names may be listed under their Native language or anglicised name, in many cases both forms of the name are listed.

odd.head: General
odd.p: Items listed as Removed have most likely been added to other collections.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Native American artist vertical file, #9241. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.persname: Koerner, W. H. D. (William Henry Dethlef), 1878-1938

Hush Kay Yel Ha Yahn (Come Out with Anger)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Collective, See Quick To See Smith

did.unittitle: Tse Ye Mu (Spruce Falling in Water)
